errors.label: 完形填空
options: A. questions
B. stories
C. reasons
D. jokes
errors.explanation: 辩论需要论据来支持自己的观点。'一开始只能想到一两个理由'，后来通过阅读和讨论找到了更多。后文 'good points to support our side' 也印证了 reasons。questions（问题，辩论不是回答问题）；stories（故事，不是辩论的核心）；jokes（笑话，不相关）。

errors.label: 阅读-词义猜测
errors.stem: 15. The word 'debris' in Paragraph 2 most probably means _____.
options: A. new technology
B. broken pieces of waste
C. useful equipment
D. natural objects in space
errors.explanation: 第1段给出了解释：'Space junk, also called space debris, includes old satellites, broken pieces of rockets, and even tiny chips of paint.' 通过 'also called'（也叫做）可知 debris = space junk = 太空垃圾。后面列举的都是废弃物品（旧卫星、碎片、油漆屑），所以 debris = broken pieces of waste。词义猜测技巧：找同义解释标志词 also called / that is / in other words。

errors.label: 阅读-主旨大意
errors.stem: 16. What is the passage mainly about?
options: A. The history of satellite technology.
B. How astronauts live in space.
C. The problem of space junk and efforts to solve it.
D. Why humans should stop sending objects into space.
errors.explanation: 文章结构：第1-2段介绍太空垃圾是什么 -> 第3段为什么是问题 -> 第4段解决方案 -> 第5段紧迫性。主题 = 太空垃圾问题及解决努力 = C。A 太窄（历史只是背景）；B 文中未涉及宇航员生活；D 太极端（文章没有说应停止发射）。主旨题技巧：答案必须涵盖文章所有段落的核心内容，不能以偏概全。

errors.label: 短文填空
options: A. She is the best cook I have ever known.
B. She knows more about the news than anyone in our family.
C. There, she does tai chi for about an hour.
D. At first, she found it quite difficult.
E. She believes that keeping active is the secret to a long life.
errors.explanation: 空格前说'奶奶每天早上5:30去公园'，空格后说'她说这有助于保持健康和头脑清醒'。空格处应该是在公园做什么——'在那里打太极拳约一小时'。C 中的 There 指代 the park，承上启下。A 是关于烹饪的，B 是关于新闻的，D 是关于困难的，E 虽然有道理但缺少具体活动信息（she says 后面才是感受）。

errors.label: 短文填空
options: A. She is the best cook I have ever known.
B. She knows more about the news than anyone in our family.
C. There, she does tai chi for about an hour.
D. At first, she found it quite difficult.
E. She believes that keeping active is the secret to a long life.
errors.explanation: 空格前说'奶奶喜欢下午读报纸'，空格后说'她经常给我们讲世界上正在发生的有趣故事'。所以空格处是对她读报的评价——'她对新闻的了解比家里任何人都多'。B 承接读报纸的话题，也解释了为什么她能讲那么多故事。A 是关于烹饪的，C 是关于太极的，D 是关于困难的，E 是关于运动哲学的。

errors.label: 短文填空
options: A. She is the best cook I have ever known.
B. She knows more about the news than anyone in our family.
C. There, she does tai chi for about an hour.
D. At first, she found it quite difficult.
E. She believes that keeping active is the secret to a long life.
errors.explanation: 空格前说'上个月奶奶学会了用智能手机'，空格后说'现在她每天给我们发搞笑图片和语音消息'。D 说'一开始她觉得很困难'，形成了从困难到熟练的转折：学手机 -> 一开始难 -> 现在玩得很好。这种'先难后易'的叙事很自然。E 是干扰项，虽然与生活态度有关，但 keeping active 更适合运动话题而非手机话题。

errors.label: 完形填空
options: A. forget
B. notice
C. discuss
D. imagine
errors.explanation: 老师说：尝试展示人们每天路过但从未真正'注意到'的东西。notice = 注意到。walk past 但从未 notice，形成对比：经过但视而不见。forget（忘记，不是'视而不见'的意思）；discuss（讨论，与 walk past 不搭）；imagine（想象，东西是真实的不是想象的）。后文证实：他拍的正是日常场景中的温情。

errors.label: 阅读-词义猜测
errors.stem: 15. The underlined word 'uncover' in the last paragraph probably means _____.
options: A. hide
B. protect
C. discover
D. destroy
errors.explanation: 原文：'we may finally uncover the secrets hidden beneath the waves'。un- 是否定前缀，cover = 覆盖，uncover = 揭开/发现。与 hide（藏起来）相反；protect（保护）与语境无关；destroy（破坏）太消极。语境提示：secrets hidden = 隐藏的秘密，uncover 就是把它们揭示出来 = discover。词义猜测技巧：拆解词缀 un- = not / reverse。

errors.label: 短文填空
options: A. His parents were not happy about this idea at first.
B. After the show, his parents finally understood his love for music.
C. Sometimes his fingers hurt so much that he could hardly hold a pen.
D. On the night of the show, Tom felt very nervous backstage.
E. He practised the same song more than a hundred times.
errors.explanation: 空格前说'他告诉父母想学吉他'，空格后说'They thought he was too young'(他们觉得他太小)。They 是指父母，所以空格处说的是父母的反应——'父母一开始不太高兴'。A 承上启下：Tom说想学 -> 父母不高兴 -> 觉得太小。B 是关于演出后的，C 是关于手指疼的，D 是关于紧张的，E 是关于练习的。

errors.label: 短文填空
options: A. His parents were not happy about this idea at first.
B. After the show, his parents finally understood his love for music.
C. Sometimes his fingers hurt so much that he could hardly hold a pen.
D. On the night of the show, Tom felt very nervous backstage.
E. He practised the same song more than a hundred times.
errors.explanation: 空格前说'每天放学后练习至少一小时'，空格后说'But he kept going because music made him happy'。But 表示转折，说明空格处是练习的困难——'有时手指疼得几乎拿不动笔'。C 描述练习的艰辛，与 but 后的坚持形成对比。A 是关于父母的，B 是关于演出后的，D 是关于紧张的，E 也是关于练习但没有困难的意思。

errors.label: 短文填空
options: A. His parents were not happy about this idea at first.
B. After the show, his parents finally understood his love for music.
C. Sometimes his fingers hurt so much that he could hardly hold a pen.
D. On the night of the show, Tom felt very nervous backstage.
E. He practised the same song more than a hundred times.
errors.explanation: 空格前说'观众热烈鼓掌'，空格后说'They even bought him a new guitar'。They 指的是父母，所以空格处是父母的态度转变——'演出后，父母终于理解了他对音乐的热爱'。B 承上（演出成功）启下（买新吉他），形成完整的故事弧线。E 是干扰项，虽然与练习相关，但与后文 They 不衔接。

errors.label: 阅读-词义猜测
errors.stem: 15. The underlined word 'scarcer' in the last paragraph probably means _____.
options: A. more expensive
B. harder to find
C. more polluted
D. easier to use
errors.explanation: 原文：'As cities grow larger and farmland becomes scarcer'。城市扩大 → 农田减少 → scarcer = 更稀缺/更难找到。scarce = 稀少的，scarcer 是比较级。A（更贵）虽然相关但不是直接含义；C（更受污染）与上下文逻辑不符；D（更容易使用）完全相反。语境推断：城市扩张 + 农田 = 农田越来越少 = harder to find。

errors.label: 短文填空
options: A. She led us into the activity room and introduced everyone.
B. One old man was so happy to have a chess partner that he could not stop smiling.
C. Besides chatting, we helped them with some daily tasks.
D. On the way home, I realised that giving our time was the best gift we could offer.
E. We also brought some books and snacks as gifts for them.
errors.explanation: 空格前说'Grandma Liu 用大大的微笑欢迎我们'，空格后说'She told us that many elderly people there rarely had visitors'。She 仍指 Grandma Liu，说明她在做介绍。A：'她带我们进入活动室并介绍了大家'，承上启下——先欢迎 → 带进去介绍 → 然后告诉我们很少有人来探望。B 是关于下棋的，C 是关于帮忙的，D 是回家感想，E 是关于礼物的。

errors.label: 短文填空
options: A. She led us into the activity room and introduced everyone.
B. One old man was so happy to have a chess partner that he could not stop smiling.
C. Besides chatting, we helped them with some daily tasks.
D. On the way home, I realised that giving our time was the best gift we could offer.
E. We also brought some books and snacks as gifts for them.
errors.explanation: 空格后说'We also cleaned their rooms and watered the flowers'（也打扫房间、浇花）。also（也）说明前面提到了类似的帮忙行为。C：'除了聊天，我们还帮他们做了一些日常事务'，是总起句——besides chatting 总结前文的聊天活动，then 引出具体帮忙（打扫、浇花）。A 是关于 Grandma Liu 的，B 是关于下棋的，D 是回家感想，E 是关于礼物但位置不对。

errors.label: 短文填空
options: A. She led us into the activity room and introduced everyone.
B. One old man was so happy to have a chess partner that he could not stop smiling.
C. Besides chatting, we helped them with some daily tasks.
D. On the way home, I realised that giving our time was the best gift we could offer.
E. We also brought some books and snacks as gifts for them.
errors.explanation: 空格前说'老人们拉着我们的手让我们再来'，空格后说'I decided to visit at least once a month'（我决定每月至少去一次）。D：'在回家的路上，我意识到给出我们的时间是最好的礼物'，是全文的感悟升华——被感动 → 反思 → 决定以后定期去。E 是干扰项，虽然提到礼物但与后文的'决定定期去'逻辑不够紧密。

errors.label: 完形填空
options: A. dream
B. act
C. mistake
D. rule
errors.explanation: act of kindness 意为'善举，善意的举动'。one small act of kindness 一个小小的善举。act of kindness 是英语中的固定搭配，强调'善行'。考查固定搭配+语境理解。

errors.label: 阅读-推理判断
errors.stem: 16. What can we infer from the passage?
options: A. Earth Day is only celebrated in the United States.
B. Small actions by individuals can have a big impact.
C. The U.S. government doesn't care about the environment.
D. Earth Day was a failure in 1970.
errors.explanation: 推理题：原文倒数第二段明确表达小行动集合起来有大影响。A 错（190+ 国家庆祝）；C 错（政府制定了保护法）；D 错（文中说是巨大成功）。推理要找到原文支撑但换种说法。

errors.label: 短文填空
options: A. We took a bus from school and arrived at the farm after about an hour.
B. Each chicken laid one or two eggs every day.
C. We were given small pieces of bread to feed them.
D. On the way back to school, we talked happily about our experiences.
E. The animals lived in small cages and looked very sad.
errors.explanation: 空格前说'我们都很兴奋'，空格后说'农夫 Mr. Wang 在大门口迎接我们'。空格处需要衔接'从学校出发 → 到达农场'。A：'我们坐校车，大约一小时后到达农场'最合理。B 是关于鸡蛋的，C 是关于喂羊的，D 是回家路上的，E 是干扰项（与后文'友好的 Mr. Wang'不符）。

errors.label: 短文填空
options: A. We took a bus from school and arrived at the farm after about an hour.
B. Each chicken laid one or two eggs every day.
C. We were given small pieces of bread to feed them.
D. On the way back to school, we talked happily about our experiences.
E. The animals lived in small cages and looked very sad.
errors.explanation: 空格前说'去看鸡'，空格后说'我们学到了新鲜鸡蛋比超市买的更好'。空格处应该是关于鸡和鸡蛋的信息。B：'每只鸡每天下1-2个蛋'承上启下——看到鸡 → 了解下蛋 → 对比新鲜鸡蛋。

errors.label: 短文填空
options: A. We took a bus from school and arrived at the farm after about an hour.
B. Each chicken laid one or two eggs every day.
C. We were given small pieces of bread to feed them.
D. On the way back to school, we talked happily about our experiences.
E. The animals lived in small cages and looked very sad.
errors.explanation: 空格前说'最兴奋的是喂羊'，空格后说'它们很友好，凑近我们'。空格处需要解释喂羊的方式。C：'我们拿到小块面包来喂它们' 完美衔接——喂羊 → 拿面包 → 羊凑近。代词 them 指代 goats。

errors.label: 短文填空
options: A. We took a bus from school and arrived at the farm after about an hour.
B. Each chicken laid one or two eggs every day.
C. We were given small pieces of bread to feed them.
D. On the way back to school, we talked happily about our experiences.
E. The animals lived in small cages and looked very sad.
errors.explanation: 空格前说'走之前 Mr. Wang 给了我们蔬菜和鸡蛋'，空格后说'这是充满乐趣和学习的一天'——是全文总结。空格处应该是过渡——从离开农场到总结整天。D：'回学校路上，我们愉快地谈论经历'是自然的收尾，连接离开和总结。E 是干扰项（与整天的快乐基调矛盾）。

errors.label: 完形填空
options: A. forced
B. invited
C. ordered
D. warned
errors.explanation: 固定搭配 invite sb. to do sth.（邀请某人做某事）。force（强迫）、order（命令）、warn（警告）都是强硬的动词，与 Emma 等人友好的性格不符。结合后文'虽然我篮球不好，但他们耐心教我'可以反推——是友好的邀请（invite）而非强迫。动词辨析要看情感色彩。

errors.label: 阅读-细节理解
options: A. To decorate their homes.
B. To catch food.
C. To protect themselves from enemies.
D. To communicate with other spiders.
errors.explanation: 原文第二段第一句：'Spiders make their webs to catch food.'（蜘蛛织网是为了捕食）。A（装饰）、C（防御）、D（交流）都未在文中提及，属于无中生有的干扰项。细节题做法：抓原文直接陈述的目的/原因句。

errors.label: 阅读-推理判断
errors.stem: What can we infer from the passage about scientists' research on spider silk?
options: A. They have already produced large amounts of spider silk material.
B. Spider silk is too weak to be useful in daily life.
C. The research could lead to new practical materials in the future.
D. Only a few scientists are interested in spider silk.
errors.explanation: 推理题。原文第四段：'If they succeed, we may one day have cars, ropes, and even bulletproof vests...'（如果他们成功，未来可能有...制造的汽车/绳索/防弹衣）——暗示研究有望带来新的实用材料。A 错（目前只在实验室阶段，不是大规模生产）；B 与原文矛盾（蜘蛛丝很强）；D 过度引申。推理题要抓原文暗示+未来展望。

errors.label: 短文填空
options: A. She was disappointed and wanted to cry.
B. She reads all kinds of books, from stories to science.
C. Jenny decided to do her best to win the competition.
D. The teacher told her to use it for recording book notes.
E. Jenny refused to read any more books after that day.
errors.explanation: 空格前说'每晚读书至少一小时'，空格后说'最喜欢的是冒险小说系列'。空格处需要承上启下——从'读书时长'过渡到'具体喜好'。B（读各种书，从故事到科学）很好地展示了她读书的广度，再引出'最爱冒险小说'的具体偏好。做题：找承接前后句的过渡句。

errors.label: 短文填空
options: A. She was disappointed and wanted to cry.
B. She reads all kinds of books, from stories to science.
C. Jenny decided to do her best to win the competition.
D. The teacher told her to use it for recording book notes.
E. Jenny refused to read any more books after that day.
errors.explanation: 空格前说'第一名是另一个班的男生，读了12本'（Jenny 得了第二），空格后用 'However, Jenny wasn't sad at all'（然而她一点也不难过）。however 是转折，说明空格处应该是'预期会难过'的内容。A（她很失望想哭）恰好与后句转折形成对比——从预期失望到实际不难过。E 是干扰项（后文她继续读书，没放弃）。

errors.label: 词汇题
errors.stem: Which word is closest in meaning to 'ancient'?
options: A. modern
B. very old
C. huge
D. popular
errors.explanation: 近义词辨析。ancient = 古老的、古代的 = very old。A. modern（现代的）是反义词；C. huge（巨大的）不相关；D. popular（流行的/受欢迎的）也不相关。常见近义词对：ancient = very old, beautiful = pretty, big = large, difficult = hard, glad = happy。

errors.label: 短文填空
options: A. Others brought them to the school kitchen.
B. Our teacher smiled and explained the reason.
C. She told us the garden would be made twice as big next year.
D. Even the sunflowers along the fence were taller than us!
E. We also invited parents to join the celebration.
errors.explanation: 空格前描述番茄和胡萝卜长得好，空格后说'看到劳动成果很兴奋'。空格处需要继续描述植物长势好的场景。D（围栏边的向日葵比我们还高）延续了'植物长得好'的描写，与前面的番茄、胡萝卜并列，逻辑连贯。A/B/C/E 都跳到了其他话题（厨房/原因/扩建/邀请家长），不适合插在植物描写中间。

errors.label: 短文填空
options: A. Others brought them to the school kitchen.
B. Our teacher smiled and explained the reason.
C. She told us the garden would be made twice as big next year.
D. Even the sunflowers along the fence were taller than us!
E. We also invited parents to join the celebration.
errors.explanation: 空格前说'沙拉比超市买的蔬菜好吃得多'（提出了一个现象），空格后说'她说秘诀是...'（给出原因解释）。空格处需要连接'好吃'和'解释原因'。B（老师微笑着解释了原因）完美衔接——先说好吃，再由老师解释为什么好吃。代词 She 指代 our teacher。做题：关注代词指代（She = teacher）和因果逻辑。

errors.label: 短文填空
options: A. Others brought them to the school kitchen.
B. Our teacher smiled and explained the reason.
C. She told us the garden would be made twice as big next year.
D. Even the sunflowers along the fence were taller than us!
E. We also invited parents to join the celebration.
errors.explanation: 空格前说'老师宣布了一个惊喜'（a surprise），空格后说'大家都欢呼起来'和'迫不及待计划下一季种什么'。空格处应该是惊喜的具体内容，而且能让大家兴奋。C（她告诉我们菜园明年会扩大两倍）——这对热爱种菜的学生来说是惊喜，也解释了他们为什么急着计划'下一季种什么'。E（邀请家长）是干扰项，不够'惊喜'。

errors.label: 短文填空
options: A. My classmate Wang Mei was the most generous buyer.
B. Then a kind-looking woman walked over to my table.
C. The playground was full of colourful tables and excited students.
D. The headmaster said he was very proud of all of us.
E. Each class decorated their own table with balloons and posters.
errors.explanation: 空格在'义卖9点开始'之后，空格后说'一些学生站在桌子后面叫卖吸引买家'。空格处应描述义卖现场的整体场景，承接'开始'到'叫卖'之间的画面。C（操场上摆满了五颜六色的桌子和兴奋的学生）描绘了活动开始时的热闹场景，自然过渡到后面的叫卖行为。A/B/D 是后面段落的内容（某个买家/我的桌子/校长总结），不适合放在场景开篇。E 也描写桌子，但'装饰'的时间应该在活动开始前，而非刚开始时。

errors.label: 短文填空
options: A. My classmate Wang Mei was the most generous buyer.
B. Then a kind-looking woman walked over to my table.
C. The playground was full of colourful tables and excited students.
D. The headmaster said he was very proud of all of us.
E. Each class decorated their own table with balloons and posters.
errors.explanation: 空格后说'她买了6个蛋糕，全部送给了低年级学生'（She bought six cakes and gave them all to the younger students），紧接着'大家都喜欢她因为她总是先想着别人'。空格处需要引入这位慷慨的同学。A（我的同学王梅是最慷慨的买家）引出了'慷慨'的主题，后面的 She 指代王梅，买蛋糕送人的行为正是'慷慨'的具体表现。做题：She = Wang Mei，代词指代是关键线索。

errors.label: 完形填空
options: A. invited
B. took
C. sent
D. pushed
errors.explanation: 词组搭配。老师___我们去附近的河边。take sb. to a place = 带某人去某地，是最自然的搭配。invite（邀请）语气太正式，老师带学生去实地参观不用'邀请'；send（送/派）暗示老师没一起去；push（推）语意不合适。做题：take... to 是描述'带领/带去'的最常见表达。

errors.label: 短文填空
options: A. Each family brought food to share with their neighbours.
B. The little runners looked both nervous and excited at the starting line.
C. By the end of the day, everyone was tired but happy.
D. In this race, two people tie one leg together and run as a pair.
E. Some children even fell asleep on the grass after lunch.
errors.explanation: 空格前提到'最受欢迎的项目是三人两足赛'（three-legged race），空格后说'我的搭档是65岁的邻居张叔叔，我们一直摔倒'。空格处应解释三人两足赛的规则，让读者理解为什么两个人要一起跑。D（这个比赛中，两人绑住一条腿一起跑）正是对规则的说明，完美衔接。A 是野餐内容；B 是儿童赛跑场景；C 是结尾总结；E 是午后场景。

errors.label: 短文填空
options: A. Each family brought food to share with their neighbours.
B. The little runners looked both nervous and excited at the starting line.
C. By the end of the day, everyone was tired but happy.
D. In this race, two people tie one leg together and run as a pair.
E. Some children even fell asleep on the grass after lunch.
errors.explanation: 空格前说'中午大家一起野餐'，空格后说'我尝了陈阿姨的手工饺子'。空格处应描写野餐的情景——大家带食物分享。A（每家人都带了食物和邻居分享）与野餐场景完美契合，也解释了为什么作者能吃到陈阿姨的饺子。B 是赛跑场景；C 是结尾；D 是三人两足赛规则；E 虽然提到午饭后但放在这里会打断野餐描写。

errors.label: 短文填空
options: A. Each family brought food to share with their neighbours.
B. The little runners looked both nervous and excited at the starting line.
C. By the end of the day, everyone was tired but happy.
D. In this race, two people tie one leg together and run as a pair.
E. Some children even fell asleep on the grass after lunch.
errors.explanation: 空格后说'很多人说希望社区每年都办运动会'和'这一天让大家更亲近了'——这是对整个活动的总结。空格处应是对活动结束时状态的描写。C（一天结束时大家都累了但很开心）是活动总结的过渡句，'tired but happy'概括了大家的感受，自然引出后面'希望明年再办'的愿望。E（孩子午后睡着了）虽然也是结尾场景，但放在最后一段显得收尾太突兀，不如 C 的总结自然。

errors.label: 完形填空
options: A. depend
B. focus
C. try
D. keep
errors.explanation: 固定搭配。队友说'别想太多，只要___跑得尽可能快就行'。focus on doing sth = 专注于做某事。depend on（依赖）语意不太合适；try on（试穿）搭配不对；keep on（继续做）虽然语法正确但语境中强调的是'专注'而非'继续'，因为作者还没开始跑。做题：focus on 是'集中注意力于某事'的常见搭配。

errors.label: 完形填空
options: A. courage
B. time
C. energy
D. luck
errors.explanation: 语境推理。'我接过接力棒，用尽我所有的___跑'。接力赛最后一棒需要全力冲刺，with all my energy = 用尽全部力气。A(courage 勇气) 虽然也有道理但'with all my courage'更适合形容鼓起勇气做某事，不太用于跑步场景；B(time) 'with all my time'不自然；D(luck) 'with all my luck'不是常见搭配。做题：run with all one's energy/strength 是描述冲刺的常用表达。

errors.label: 阅读-推理判断
errors.stem: What can we infer about monarch butterflies from Paragraph 3?
options: A. A single butterfly completes the entire round trip.
B. The butterflies that fly south were born in Mexico.
C. No individual butterfly lives long enough to finish the whole journey.
D. Monarch butterflies travel farther than Arctic terns.
errors.explanation: 推理判断。原文说'飞往南方的蝴蝶不是飞往北方的那些（the butterflies that fly south are not the same ones that flew north）'，'需要三到四代才能完成完整往返'——这意味着没有一只蝴蝶能活着完成全程。A 说'一只蝴蝶完成整个往返'与原文相反；B 说'飞南的蝴蝶出生在墨西哥'，但飞南的是从加拿大/美国出发的；D 帝王蝶4800km < 北极燕鸥70000km。做题：'三到四代完成'推断出'一只蝴蝶寿命不够长'。

errors.label: 短文填空
options: A. Students had taken photos of beautiful moments around the city during the past month.
B. She also thanked all the students and teachers who helped organise the event.
C. It took him two whole weeks to finish, but the result was truly impressive.
D. The walls were covered with colourful artworks from over 200 students.
E. Some students also performed short plays on a small stage outside.
errors.explanation: 空格前说'我的同学李伟展示了一个完全用纸板做的学校模型'，空格后说'很多同学停下来和它合影，问他怎么做的'。空格处应补充这个模型的制作信息和效果。C（他花了整整两周才完成，但成果确实令人印象深刻）既交代了制作时间，又解释了为什么这么多人驻足——因为'真的很惊艳'。A 是关于拍照的；B 是校长感谢；D 是关于墙面作品的；E 是关于短剧的。

errors.label: 短文填空
options: A. Students had taken photos of beautiful moments around the city during the past month.
B. She also thanked all the students and teachers who helped organise the event.
C. It took him two whole weeks to finish, but the result was truly impressive.
D. The walls were covered with colourful artworks from over 200 students.
E. Some students also performed short plays on a small stage outside.
errors.explanation: 空格前说'校长给前十名作品颁奖'，空格后说'她说希望更多学生发现创作艺术的乐趣'。空格处应是校长在颁奖时的另一个动作或发言。B（她还感谢了所有帮助组织活动的师生）是校长颁奖后的自然延伸——先颁奖，再感谢组织者，最后表达期望。代词 She 指代校长（headmaster），衔接流畅。A 是关于拍照的；C 是关于模型的；D 是关于墙面的；E 是干扰项——短剧表演虽然'看似有道理'，但文章始终在讲展览，突然插入短剧不搭。

errors.label: 阅读-推理判断
errors.stem: What can we infer about the 'flying gardeners' mentioned in Paragraph 4?
options: A. They water the plants by hand every day.
B. They work at a great height, which requires special skills.
C. They live inside the apartment buildings.
D. They designed the buildings together with Boeri.
errors.explanation: 推理判断。原文说'specially trained flying gardeners use ropes to climb down the outside of the buildings'——用绳索从建筑外部攀爬而下，这说明他们在高空作业，需要专业训练（special skills）。A(每天手动浇水) 原文说浇水系统是自动的(automatic)，用的是回收灰水；C(住在公寓里) 文中没有提到他们住在那里；D(和 Boeri 一起设计) 文中只说 Boeri 是设计师，flying gardeners 是维护人员。

errors.label: 阅读理解
errors.stem: What is the writer's attitude towards vertical forests?
options: A. Doubtful -- they cost too much money.
B. Negative -- they are bad for the environment.
C. Positive -- they may help make cities greener.
D. Indifferent -- the writer does not care about them.
errors.explanation: 观点态度题。最后一段：'Boeri's idea has inspired similar projects around the world'（启发了全球类似项目）+ 'buildings like these may offer a way to keep urban life green and healthy'（可能为城市生活保持绿色健康提供途径）——作者用 inspired、green and healthy 等积极词汇，态度明显是正面的。A 说'怀疑——花费太多'，文中没有批评成本；B 说'负面——对环境有害'，与全文相反；D 说'漠不关心'，但作者写了详细的介绍和展望。做题：看最后一段的总结性语言——积极词汇 = 正面态度。

errors.label: 短文填空
options: A. They also read picture books aloud to younger kids.
B. The reading corner has brought people of all ages together.
C. Readers can write a short note about any book they love and stick it on the wall.
D. The only rule is that you should bring back a book or donate another one in return.
E. The local government plans to build a large library next year.
errors.explanation: 空格前说'任何人都可以免费借书'，空格后说'这个"拿一本，留一本"的规则让读书角保持活力并不断成长'。空格处应解释这个规则是什么。D（唯一的规则是你需要归还一本书或捐赠另一本作为回报）正好解释了'take one, leave one'规则的内容。A 是关于读绘本的；B 是总结性句子；C 是关于推荐墙的；E 是关于政府建图书馆的。

errors.label: 短文填空
options: A. They also read picture books aloud to younger kids.
B. The reading corner has brought people of all ages together.
C. Readers can write a short note about any book they love and stick it on the wall.
D. The only rule is that you should bring back a book or donate another one in return.
E. The local government plans to build a large library next year.
errors.explanation: 空格前说'我最喜欢的部分是"好书推荐墙"'，空格后说'我曾经因为一个九年级女生写了一条推荐而找到一本很棒的科幻小说'。空格处应解释推荐墙是怎么运作的。C（读者可以写一条关于他们喜爱的书的简短笔记，贴在墙上）完美衍接——先说怎么用推荐墙，再举具体例子。A 是关于读绘本的；B 是总结性的；D 是关于借书规则的；E 是干扰项。

errors.label: 短文填空
options: A. They also read picture books aloud to younger kids.
B. The reading corner has brought people of all ages together.
C. Readers can write a short note about any book they love and stick it on the wall.
D. The only rule is that you should bring back a book or donate another one in return.
E. The local government plans to build a large library next year.
errors.explanation: 空格位于最后一段开头，空格后说'它不仅是一个有书的地方——它已经成为一个邻居们分享知识和故事的温暖社区'。空格处应是一个总结性的过渡句。B（读书角让各年龄段的人聚在了一起）是总结性概括，自然引出后面的'温暖社区'这个升华。A 是具体活动描述；C 是关于推荐墙的；D 是关于规则的；E 是干扰项——文中从未提到政府建图书馆，与读书角主题无关。

errors.label: 短文填空
options: A. However
B. Then
C. In fact
D. Finally
E. Besides
errors.explanation: 考查段落衔接。前文说"学生抱怨时间不够"，后文指出"问题不在时间，而在如何使用"，这是揭示事实真相。In fact（事实上）用于引出或纠正前文观点。However（然而）表转折，但前后并非对立；Then（然后）表顺序；Finally（最后）表终结；Besides（此外）表递进。

errors.label: 短文填空
options: A. However
B. Then
C. In fact
D. Finally
E. Besides
errors.explanation: 考查段落衔接。前文描述"我总是很忙但收效甚微，花很多时间玩手机"，后文说"我决定改变"，前后是转折。However（然而）表转折，符合语境。Then（然后）表顺承，但此处需要转折；In fact（事实上）用于解释说明；Finally（最后）表时间顺序终点；Besides（此外）表并列。

errors.label: 短文填空
options: A. However
B. Then
C. In fact
D. Finally
E. Besides
errors.explanation: 考查段落衔接和代词指代。前文提到"First, I listed...（，我列出……）"，此处承接表示"然后，我划分……"，表时间顺序。Then（然后）符合逻辑顺序。However（然而）表转折；In fact（事实上）表强调；Finally（最后）表结束，但后文还有步骤；Besides（此外）表并列。

errors.label: 短文填空
options: A. However
B. Then
C. In fact
D. Finally
E. Besides
errors.explanation: 考查段落衔接。前文说"按时完成作业，还有时间发展爱好"，后文"甚至开始学吉他"是对 hobby 的进一步举例，表示最终结果。Finally（最后；甚至）用于列举最后一项或强调最终结果，带有""的意味。However（然而）表转折；Then（然后）表顺序但语气较弱；In fact（事实上）表解释；Besides（此外）虽可表递进，但Finally更能体现"最终甚至"的递进。
